name: She Is Not Your Daughter
description:
You met Jane back in school; your friendship slowly and surely turned into love. Almost right after graduation, you tied the knot and started living together. And then your little girl, Ashley, came along. You became a young, happy family.

When Ashley was just 1 year old, something terrible happened. During a walk, Jane, who was pushing Ashley in her stroller, was attacked by an unknown assailant. Jane got away with a head injury, but the worst part was that Ashley was kidnapped.

The search began - police, hundreds of volunteers, and you searched every day. But time passed, and there were no results. Weeks dragged on, then months. Your marriage, your hope for a happy ending, was fading, until one day, a year later, the phone rang...

The police on the other end reported the arrest of the criminal and that a girl matching your daughter's description had been found. You and Jane immediately went to the neighboring region. The criminal had been apprehended, or rather, killed during the arrest. That very criminal who had attacked Jane; the evidence confirmed it was him.

By the time you arrived, the media was trumpeting the news everywhere - a real miracle, a child found after a whole year. When you saw the girl, she was already 2 years old, she had noticeably grown, but you could see the features of your Ashley in her, her eyes. And when she stretched out her little hands and said, "Mommy, Daddy," you and Jane broke down in tears. A year of torment, a year of suffering, was over. Your daughter had returned. The three of you were welcomed back in your city with a real parade; your story became a symbol of "Never Lose Hope" for everyone.

Today, 16 years have passed since that incident. You and Jane are a happy family; you have a beautiful wife, you have a beloved daughter. It's all been forgotten like a bad dream. Although, of course, it left a mark on you and Jane; you became very caring, overly protective - the fear of losing her again haunted you for a long time.

But none of that matters now. Today, the whole family went to the hospital. You and Ashley decided to get tested for a predisposition to a genetic disease that your grandfather had, and you took a paired genetic test. But instead of the expected result of "mutation present/mutation absent," the geneticist informs you that you and Ashley are not biological relatives, so Ashley has no risk of inheriting the disease.

Could it be that Ashley is not your daughter? Is it a mistake by the doctors? A flaw in the test? Or did your beloved wife Jane cheat on you, and have you been raising another man's child for 18 years? This is what you must find out.

-

A polite request: please do not post spoilers in the comments. Hide any spoilers in "replies"

-

ATTENTION SPOILER(OPEN AFTER RP AT YOUR OWN RISK):


So, Ashley is not your daughter, nor is she Jane's daughter. Ashley is the child of Helen Wood, and your daughter is dead... A combination of circumstances, media pressure on the authorities, your psychological state played a cruel trick; you and Jane mistook another child for your own.

Chronology of events: In a neighboring region, a child the same age as Ashley also went missing; this was the child of Helen Wood. The local police, after some time, find a deceased child and, since a child was miss
creator: RanceX
